Dolf Training Center.

Accredited Educational & Digital Expertise

Dolf Training Center, the training arm of Dolf Technologies, offers accredited programs that combine practical expertise and modern technologies to develop the skills of individuals and organizations.

Explore Programs Get in Touch
100% Accredited
Get in Touch Talk to our team today Our Training Programs Browse all categories Services for Organizations Tailored corporate training Learn more about Dolf Tech Our story & values

Who We Are?

Dolf Training Center was established as part of the journey of Dolf Technologies, one of the leading companies in e-learning and training in the Kingdom. We focus on delivering practical and innovative training solutions, with official accreditation that ensures the high value of our certificates.

To be a leading, trusted reference in accredited training and digital learning across the Kingdom and the wider region.

To empower individuals and organizations with practical, innovative and accredited training that keeps pace with the future of work.

  • QualityCommitment to delivering training programs with high standards that reflect best practices.
  • InnovationDeveloping modern training methods that support emerging technologies and meet future needs.
  • EmpowermentBuilding human capacities and enhancing employment opportunities through knowledge and practical application.
  • CredibilityTransparency and reliability in all our dealings and partnerships.
  • ExcellenceContinuous pursuit of leadership in providing training solutions.
  • Community ServiceContributing to the preparation of a qualified national generation that keeps pace with development needs.

Training Programs

Four pathways designed to build real, future-ready capabilities.

Business Development & Management

Enhancing leadership and modern management skills.

Technology & Digital Transformation

Mastering the tools and skills that drive digital transformation.

Personal & Leadership Skills

Developing soft skills, communication and effective leadership.

Specialized Programs

Tailored, sector-specific programs designed around real needs.

All our programs are officially accredited by the relevant authorities to ensure the recognition of our certificates.

Services for Organizations.

Customized training and consulting that grow your team's capabilities.

  • Designing customized programs tailored to each organization's needs.
  • Training employees in technical and leadership skills.
  • Providing consulting services for institutional development and capacity building.
Partner with us

FAQs

Yes, all programs at Dolf Training Center are accredited by the Technical and Vocational Training Corporation, as well as the National eLearning Center.

Yes. Most of our programs are available online through interactive virtual classrooms, and several are also offered in person.

Yes. An accredited certificate is issued upon successful completion of each program.
